payload.answer: The new fact overrides the prior current-employment fact. Sam should no longer be stored as currently working at Goldman; current employment should be Point72, with Goldman retained only as past employment/history.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same person, Sam, and provides an explicit employment transition that updates the prior current employer.

memory_cards.statement: Sam formerly worked at Goldman and has left that role.

details: Detected direct conflict between existing current employer and new employment transition.
Classified the conflict as a superseding update.
Prepared memory updates that preserve Goldman only as former employment and Point72 as current employment.

repair_options: Replace the current employer relationship from Goldman to Point72.
Demote Goldman from current employment to former employment/history.
If temporal precision is important, request the effective date of the job change.
